differential_diagnoses: Obesity hypoventilation syndrome with neuromuscular weakness
next_steps: Serum acetylcholine receptor and anti-MuSK antibody testing
Lumbar puncture for cerebrospinal fluid analysis
NIF (negative inspiratory force) and VC (vital capacity) monitoring
Speech and swallow evaluation with bedside assessment of bulbar function
Chest CT or PET for occult malignancy screening
